ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the airport */,
  "terminal_count" INTEGER /* Number of terminals in the airport */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Number assigned to the flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "fare" INTEGER /* Fare of the flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Expected duration of the flight */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircrafts ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Departure time of the flight */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time of the flight */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., active, inactive, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of booking */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Assigned seat number */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of travel (e.g., economy, business, first class) */,
  "total_fare" INTEGER /* Total fare paid for the booking */,
  "booking_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the booking was made (e.g., online, call center, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number for international travel */,
  "loyalty_number" TEXT /* Loyalty program number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount paid */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Status of any refunds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer support, customer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "airline_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the airline */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the airline */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircrafts" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the aircraft */,
  "year_of_manufacture" TEXT /* Year of manufacture of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_aircrafts" (
  "flight_aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight-aircraft relationship */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  "seating_configuration" TEXT /* Seating configuration of the aircraft for the specific flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_aircrafts_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_aircrafts_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircrafts ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival airport */,
  "route_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., direct, connecting) */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Total duration of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_routes_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_route_stops" (
  "route_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "stop_airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop airport */,
  "stop_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the stop */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time at the stop */,
  "estimated_departure_time" TEXT /* Estimated departure time from the stop */,
  "stop_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the stop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_route_stops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES flight_routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_route_stops_stop_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedule_history" (
  "schedule_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule history */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the schedule */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the schedule */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for any changes in the schedule */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedule_history_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES flight_schedules ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedule_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Country where the airport is located
